{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Ś£¨Śćą'''Ôľą„ĀŅ„Āö„Āģ„Āą„ĀÜ„Āĺ„ÄĀ„Āė„āď„Āô„ĀĄ„Āģ„ĀÜ„Āĺ„ÄĀ„Āė„āď„ĀĒÔľČ„ĀĮ„ÄĀ[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]„ĀģšłÄ„Ā§„Äā
Sexagenary cycle comprehensive„ĀģÁĶĄ„ĀŅŚźą„āŹ„Āõ„Āģ19Áē™Áõģ„Āß„ÄĀŚČć„ĀĮ[[ŤĺõŚ∑≥]]„ÄĀś¨°„ĀĮ[[Áôłśú™]]„Āß„Āā„āč„Äā[[ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°Ć]]„Āß„ĀĮ„ÄĀ[[ŚćĀŚĻ≤]]„Āģ[[Ś£¨]]„ĀĮťôĹ„Āģ[[śįī]]„ÄĀ[[ŚćĀšļĆśĒĮ]]„Āģ[[Śćą]]„ĀĮťôĹ„Āģ[[ÁĀę]]„Āß„ÄĀ[[šļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥#ÁõłŚČčÔľą„ĀĚ„ĀÜ„Āď„ĀŹÔľČ|ÁõłŚČč]]ÔľąśįīŚČčÁĀęÔľČ„Āß„Āā„āč„Äā
==Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģŚĻī== [[Ť•Ņśö¶]]ŚĻī„āí60„ĀßŚČ≤„Ā£„Ā¶22„ĀĆšĹô„āčŚĻī„ĀĆŚ£¨Śćą„Āģ[[ŚĻī]]„Ā®„Ā™„āč„Äā {| class="wikitable" |+'''Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģŚĻī''' |- ![[1ŚćÉŚĻīÁīÄ]]!![[2ŚćÉŚĻīÁīÄ]]!![[3ŚćÉŚĻīÁīÄ]] |- | *[[22ŚĻī]] *[[82ŚĻī]] *[[142ŚĻī]] *[[202ŚĻī]] *[[262ŚĻī]] *[[322ŚĻī]] *[[382ŚĻī]] *[[442ŚĻī]] *[[502ŚĻī]] *[[562ŚĻī]] *[[622ŚĻī]] *[[682ŚĻī]] *[[742ŚĻī]] *[[802ŚĻī]] *[[862ŚĻī]] *[[922ŚĻī]] *[[982ŚĻī]] | *[[1042ŚĻī]] *[[1102ŚĻī]] *[[1162ŚĻī]] *[[1222ŚĻī]] *[[1282ŚĻī]] *[[1342ŚĻī]] *[[1402ŚĻī]] *[[1462ŚĻī]] *[[1522ŚĻī]] *[[1582ŚĻī]] *[[1642ŚĻī]] *[[1702ŚĻī]] *[[1762ŚĻī]] *[[1822ŚĻī]] *[[1882ŚĻī]] *[[1942ŚĻī]] | *[[2002ŚĻī]] *[[2062ŚĻī]] *[[2122ŚĻī]] *[[2182ŚĻī]] *[[2242ŚĻī]] *[[2302ŚĻī]] *[[2362ŚĻī]] *[[2422ŚĻī]] *[[2482ŚĻī]] *[[2542ŚĻī]] *[[2602ŚĻī]] *[[2662ŚĻī]] *[[2722ŚĻī]] *[[2782ŚĻī]] *[[2842ŚĻī]] *[[2902ŚĻī]] *[[2962ŚĻī]] |} ===ŚáļśĚ•šļč=== *[[Ś§©ś≠£]]10ŚĻīÔľą1582ŚĻīÔľČ - [[Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ]] *[[śėéś≤Ľ]]15ŚĻīÔľą1882ŚĻīÔľČ - [[Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§ČÔľąŚ£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪÔľČ]]
==Ś£¨Śćą„Āģśúą== Ť•Ņśö¶ŚĻī„Āģšłč1ś°Ā„ĀĆ0„ÉĽ5ÔľąŚćĀŚĻ≤„ĀĆ[[Śļö]]„ÉĽ[[šĻô]]ÔľČ„ĀģŚĻī„Āģ[[5śúą]]„ĀĆŚ£¨Śćą„Āģ[[śúą (śö¶)|śúą]]„Ā®„Ā™„āč„Äā„Āü„Ā†„Āó„Āď„Āď„Āß„ĀĄ„ĀÜśúą„ĀĮ„ÄĀ[[śóßśö¶]]„Āģśúą„āĄ[[ÁĮÄśúą]]Ôľą[[ŤäíÁ®ģ]]„Āč„āČ[[ŚįŹśöĎ]]„ĀģŚČćśó•„Āĺ„ĀßÔľČ„āíťĀ©ÁĒ®„Āô„āčŚ†īŚźą„āā„Āā„āč„Äā
==Ś£¨Śćą„Āģśó•== Ś£¨Śćą„Āģśó•„Āģ[[ťĀłśó•]]„ĀĮšĽ•šłč„ĀģťÄö„āä„Äā
===ťĀłśó•=== Ś£¨Śćą„Āģśó•„ĀĮ[[ÁäĮŚúü|ŚįŹŚúü]]„Āģ5śó•Áõģ„Āß„Āā„āč„Äā ==ťĖĘťÄ£ť†ÖÁõģ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:„ĀŅ„Āô„Āģ„Āą„ĀÜ„Āĺ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Horse-qq]] [[Category:Ś£¨Śćą]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Ś£¨Śćą]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Water Horse-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Water Horse]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:Ś£¨Śćą]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062004]] Wikidata name: Yang Water Horse [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Horse|kanji=Ś£¨Śćą|romaji=mizunoe uma|onyomi=jingo|p=r√©nw«Ē|w=jen-wu|mi= ź…ôn¬≥‚ĀĶ u¬≤¬Ļ|y=jam4 ng5|j=jam4 ng5|ci=j…źm Ňčo|mc=…≤i…™m Ňčo|oc-bs=…≤…®m Ňča Ē|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|qq=|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°Ć|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]‚Äô {{ill|Ren|ja|Ś£¨|1=Mizunoe === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
