=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

=== Events === * In [[:en:TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|TenshŇć Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}. * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).
==Months of Yang Water Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Water Horse== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}} ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Years of Yang Water Horse==
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 22 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year}} of Ren-Go.
{| class="wikitable"

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=Battle of TenshŇć-Jingo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era|1=TenshŇć (Momoyama period)}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=TenshŇć-Jingo war|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)|1=Month}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era|1=TenshŇć (Momoyama period)}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=TenshŇć-Jingo war|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)|1=Month}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Xinsi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|ŤĺõŚ∑≥|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|4=zh|5=ŤĺõŚ∑≥|6=ko|7=žč†žā¨ (ÍįĄžßÄ)|lt_ko=žč†žā¨|8=fr|9=Serpent de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinsi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}} and the following combination is {{ill|Guimi|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|Áôłśú™|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guimi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°Ć|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}‚Äô {{ill|Ren|ja|Ś£¨|1=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|lt=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|2=ja|3=Ś£¨|4=zh|5=Ś£¨|1=Mizunoe (Ś£¨)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (wuxing)|lt=Water (śįī)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=–í–ĺ–ī–į (–£-—Ā—Ė–Ĺ)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische F√ľmf-Elem√§nt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig === Events ===
* In {{ill|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|en|TenshŇć (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=TenshŇć Era|1=TenshŇć (Momoyama period)}} 10th Year (1582 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|ja|Ś§©ś≠£Ś£¨Śćą„ĀģšĻĪ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/TenshŇć Ren-Go Rebellion|1=TenshŇć-Jingo war|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939819}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 15th Year (1882 AD) ‚Äď the {{ill|Ren-Go Incident|ja|Ś£¨ŚćąšļčŚ§Č|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren-Go Incident|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=Ś£¨ŚćąŤĽćšĻĪ|1=Imo Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q709191}} (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)|1=Month}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|ťĀłśó•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|ÁäĮŚúü|lt=ShŇćdo|lt_ja=ŚįŹŚúü|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yang Water Horse also known as Ś£¨Śćą''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Geng|ja|Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|lt=Kanoe (Śļö)|2=ja|3=Śļö|4=zh|5=Śļö|1=Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (Śļö)|qq=}} or {{ill|Yi|ja|šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|lt=Kinoto (šĻô)|2=ja|3=šĻô|4=zh|5=šĻô|1=Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (šĻô)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month (Calendar)|1=Month}} of Ren-Go. However, here the term ‚Äúmonth‚ÄĚ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Xiaoshu|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.
